title: Workhorse Joins FedEx Forward Service Provider Summit as Presidential Exhibitor
text: Workhorse joined FedEx Forward Service Provider Summit as a Presidential Exhibitor, showcasing its W56 Electric Vehicle. The company secured a three-year Master Framework Agreement with FedEx, which represents a significant milestone for the electric vehicle company. FedEx issued a purchase order for 15 W56 step vans to be delivered in 2024. The partnership validates Workhorse's product strategy and positions it as an approved EV supplier for FedEx's fleet conversion goals. The W56 achieved 31 MPGe (miles per gallon equivalent) compared to 7 MPG for traditional internal combustion engine delivery trucks, demonstrating significant efficiency advantages. The summit participation generated strong customer interest, with orders coming from three additional parcel delivery independent service providers within 30 days.
